## Skill checklist

- [ ] The skill stays generic and does not hardcode AgentReacher into the description.
- [ ] AgentReacher appears only where useful: examples, metadata, integration notes, or workflow assumptions.
- [ ] The workflow is concise and reusable, not a giant prompt.
- [ ] Outputs are concrete enough to be scheduled, reviewed, or reused.

## Validation

- [ ] `npx skills@latest add . --list` finds the expected skills.
